title: Blacksheep 's Express Morning
desc: The hosts engage in insightful conversations as they discuss contemporary issues from different fields with the viewers over the phone.

title: Vayalum Vazhuvum
desc: The hosts interact with farmers and orchard owners to learn about their success and innovative approaches towards cultivating organic produce.

title: Fun Pandrom
desc: The hosts embark on a citywide journey, taking on fun challenges, meeting new people, shop vendors and discovering unique treasures.

title: Theera Kathai
desc: The host converses with individuals and famous personalities from all walks of life about their personal lives and a variety of other topics.

title: Rj Vignesh Office Show
desc: The host invites the actors and makers of films and engages in a conversation surrounding their on-set experiences and other key aspects surrounding the project.

title: Comedy Corner
desc: A compilation of the funniest comedy scenes from the Tamil film industry are played back to back in order to entertain the audience.

title: Songs
desc: A compilation of the greatest foot-tapping hits from the Tamil film industry is played back to back in order to entertain the audience.

title: Kavi Arangam
desc: The host invites various individuals to come together and share poems in a collaborative expression of creativity and emotion.

title: CK With DK
desc: The host converses with personalities from the cricketing world about their personal lives and a variety of other cricket related topics.

title: Ninaivo Oru Paravai
desc: The host holds insightful conversations with various prominent personalities, highlighting their personal and professional experiences.
